prompt: Using the provided reference image of the mobile app screen, transform it into a premium editorial magazine cover mockup about agricultural innovation. Keep the app UI recognizable on the phone display, but place it in a realistic lifestyle context: a vineyard worker in the foreground holding a smartphone that shows the app, with vineyard rows, mountains, and a few workers in the background under natural daylight. Design the full page as a Spanish-language magazine cover with a refined agricultural-business aesthetic in green, cream, and earthy tones. Add a large masthead at the top reading “REVISTA CAMPO FUTURO”, a thin top strapline with 3 items separated by vertical bars: “Especial Viñas de Chile”, “Innovación agrícola”, and “Abril 2026”, plus a subtitle line beneath the masthead: “Agricultura, innovación y gestión rural”. On the left, add a green section tag reading “TECNOLOGÍA AGRÍCOLA” and a bold stacked main cover headline: “La app con IA que está revolucionando el campo”, followed by a short deck about Kimün replacing the traditional notebook and giving real-time control to vineyards and agricultural businesses. Add a circular callout badge mentioning a special feature about Kimün as an intelligent field notebook with AI. Include 2 bottom teaser photos: one close-up of the worker holding the phone in the vineyard with page label “p.18” and a caption about field diagnosis and cellphone alerts, and one small group scene with 3 people reviewing the app together with page label “p.24” and a caption about connected field teams, voice, records, and instant costs. On the right column, add 3 article teasers with icons and page numbers: one about the end of paper and the new era of the intelligent field notebook (p.30), one about more efficient vineyards through better data-driven decisions (p.36), and one about water management 4.0 and smarter, more profitable irrigation (p.42). Add a footer strip with 5 category labels: “AGRICULTURA”, “FRUTALES”, “VIÑAS”, “GANADERÍA”, “SUSTENTABILIDAD”, plus a barcode and a small price. Make it look like a polished real magazine cover photo shoot and editorial layout, not a flat app screenshot.
